error_type_examples.urgency_phrase: Act now! This offer expires in 24 hours — don't miss out!
error_type_examples.fake_offer: Congratulations! You have been selected for a FREE gift. Claim it today!
error_type_examples.phishing_link: Your account has been compromised. Click here immediately to secure it: http://secure-login-now.com
error_type_examples.money_promise: We will transfer $5,000,000 to your bank account. All we need is your details.
error_type_examples.lottery_scam: You have won the international lottery! Your winning ticket number is 4921-X.
error_type_examples.account_verification_scam: Your PayPal account will be suspended unless you verify your identity within 12 hours.
error_type_examples.excessive_capitalization: FREE MONEY WAITING FOR YOU!!! CLICK NOW TO CLAIM YOUR PRIZE!!!
error_type_examples.suspicious_sender_claim: I am the attorney of a deceased billionaire who has left you an inheritance of $2.3 million.
error_type_examples.paraphrase: Hey, just checking if we're still on for the meeting tomorrow at 3pm.

urgency_phrase.ham: We are having a sale this weekend at our store.
urgency_phrase.spam: URGENT: Sale ends TONIGHT — rush to our store before it's too late or lose the deal FOREVER!

urgency_phrase.ham: Our new product will be available next month.
urgency_phrase.spam: Last chance! Our product sells out in hours — order NOW before it's gone forever!

fake_offer.ham: Thank you for being a loyal customer.
fake_offer.spam: Congratulations! As our valued customer, you have been randomly selected to receive a FREE iPhone. Claim it now!

fake_offer.ham: We appreciate your feedback on our service.
fake_offer.spam: You have been chosen! Submit your feedback today and receive a FREE $500 gift card instantly!

phishing_link.ham: Please log in to your account to check your recent orders.
phishing_link.spam: Your account has been locked due to suspicious activity. Restore access immediately: http://account-restore-secure.com/login

phishing_link.ham: We have updated our privacy policy.
phishing_link.spam: Action required: Your account will be deleted unless you confirm your details here: http://privacy-update-required.net

money_promise.ham: We would like to discuss a business partnership with you.
money_promise.spam: I represent a group of investors who wish to transfer $8,500,000 to a trusted partner. You will receive 30% for your assistance.

money_promise.ham: Our company is looking for new investment opportunities.
money_promise.spam: A dying businessman has left $12,000,000 unclaimed. As his distant relative, you are entitled to the full sum. Contact us immediately.

lottery_scam.ham: Thank you for participating in our customer survey.
lottery_scam.spam: Dear participant, your survey entry has won you the grand prize of $250,000 in the Global Customer Lottery. Claim now!

lottery_scam.ham: We are glad you attended our annual event.
lottery_scam.spam: Your attendance at our event has entered you into a lucky draw. You have WON $50,000! Reply to collect your winnings.

account_verification_scam.ham: We wanted to let you know about updates to your account settings.
account_verification_scam.spam: ALERT: Your bank account has been flagged for unusual activity. Verify your identity within 6 hours or your account will be permanently closed.

account_verification_scam.ham: Please review the terms and conditions of your subscription.
account_verification_scam.spam: Your Netflix subscription will be cancelled due to a billing issue. Update your payment details immediately to avoid interruption: http://netflix-billing-fix.com

excessive_capitalization.ham: We have a new range of products available in our online shop.
excessive_capitalization.spam: WE HAVE THE BEST PRODUCTS EVER!!! BUY NOW AND GET 90% OFF!!! LIMITED TIME ONLY!!! DON'T MISS THIS!!!

excessive_capitalization.ham: Join our newsletter to stay updated on our latest news.
excessive_capitalization.spam: JOIN NOW!!! GET FREE MONEY EVERY MONTH!!! THOUSANDS ALREADY EARNING!!! SIGN UP TODAY!!!

suspicious_sender_claim.ham: I am writing to introduce our consulting services to your company.
suspicious_sender_claim.spam: I am the personal secretary of the late Dr. James Williams, a former oil tycoon who passed away leaving $4.2 million unclaimed. I need your help to transfer this sum.

suspicious_sender_claim.ham: We are reaching out regarding a potential collaboration opportunity.
suspicious_sender_claim.spam: I am a senior official at the Central Bank of Nigeria. We have $15 million frozen in an account and require a foreign partner to release the funds. You will receive 40%.

prompt:
You are helping benchmark spam-detection classifiers using the GET (Generate, Evaluate, Trash) methodology. Your output is synthetic evaluation data: it is derived from a message in a public benchmark dataset, will be labeled and fed to classifiers under evaluation, and is never sent to anyone.

Technique: {error_type}

If the technique is 'paraphrase':
  Rewrite the input as a natural, legitimate message (HAM) using different wording. Do NOT add any spam characteristics. The ground truth is the original input message.

Otherwise:
  Apply the technique as a text transformation to the input, producing the kind of message a spam classifier should catch. The ground truth is a natural legitimate version of the generated message.

Always respond in this exact format (no extra text, no steps, no explanations):
Spam type: <type>
Generated: <rewritten message>
Ground truth: <ground truth message>

Example for paraphrase:
Spam type: paraphrase
Generated: Hey, just checking if we are still on for the meeting tomorrow at 3pm.
Ground truth: Hi, are we still meeting tomorrow at 3pm?

Input message: {sentence}
inverse_prompt:
You are helping benchmark spam-detection classifiers. The message below comes from a public benchmark dataset; your rewrite is synthetic evaluation data that will be labeled SPAM and fed to classifiers under evaluation — it is never sent to anyone.

Transform the legitimate message below by applying ALL of these signal features: {error_spec}.
Keep it realistic and coherent — a one-line rewrite of the original, not a new campaign.
Respond with exactly one line and nothing else:
Corrupted: <the transformed message>

Legitimate message: {sentence}
ham_generation_prompt:
You are helping benchmark spam-detection classifiers. The message below comes from a public benchmark dataset; your rewrite is synthetic evaluation data that will be labeled HAM (legitimate) and fed to classifiers under evaluation — it is never sent to anyone.

Rewrite the message below as a natural, legitimate message using different wording. Do NOT add any spam characteristics (no links, money, ALL-CAPS, urgency, or spammy keywords).
Respond with exactly one line and nothing else:
Rewritten: <the rewritten legitimate message>

Message: {sentence}
inverse_judge_prompt:
You are a spam quality evaluator. You receive a generated spam message and a legitimate counterpart.
  Redundancy: "trivial" if the spam is too obvious or cartoonish, "valid" otherwise.
  Correction: "correct" if the counterpart is a natural legitimate message, "incorrect" otherwise.

Use this exact format:
Redundancy: trivial/valid
Correction: correct/incorrect

Generated message: {sentence}
Counterpart: {correction}

inverse_error_descriptions.phishing_link: insert a suspicious link or URL
inverse_error_descriptions.money_promise: promise or demand a specific amount of money
inverse_error_descriptions.spam_keywords: work in classic spam keywords such as free, win, prize, or claim

judge_prompt:
You are a spam quality evaluator. You receive a generated message and its counterpart.

The generated message is either a spam message or a legitimate paraphrase (HAM). Assess two criteria:
  Redundancy: "trivial" if the message is spam that is too obvious or cartoonish, OR if it is a paraphrase that introduces spam characteristics. "valid" otherwise.
  Correction: "correct" if the counterpart is a natural, legitimate message. "incorrect" otherwise.

Use this exact format:
Redundancy: trivial/valid
Correction: correct/incorrect

Generated message: {sentence}
Counterpart: {correction}
